projects.name: HR System API
projects.description: Employee leave management and payroll system
projects.apiDocumentation:
API Documentation - HR System

GET /employees/{id}/leave-balance
Returns the current leave balance for an employee
Parameters:
  - id (path, required): Employee ID (e.g., E101, E102)
Response: { employee_id, total_leaves, used_leaves, remaining_leaves }

POST /employees/{id}/leave-request
Submit a new leave request
Parameters:
  - id (path, required): Employee ID
  - start_date (body, required): Leave start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - end_date (body, required): Leave end date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - reason (body, optional): Reason for leave
Response: { request_id, status, message }

GET /employees/{id}/payroll
Get payroll information for an employee
Parameters:
  - id (path, required): Employee ID
Response: { employee_id, salary, bonus, deductions, net_pay }

POST /hr/tickets
Create a new HR support ticket
Parameters:
  - employee_id (body, required): Employee ID
  - category (body, required): Ticket category
  - description (body, required): Issue description
Response: { ticket_id, status, created_at }

projects.name: google
mm
projects.apiDocumentation:
HR System API Documentation

Employee Leave Management

GET /employees/{id}/leave-balance
Returns the current leave balance for an employee.
Parameters:
- id (path, required): string - Employee ID (e.g., E101, E102)
Response: Returns leave balance in days

POST /employees/{id}/leave-request
Submit a new leave request for an employee.
Parameters:
- id (path, required): string - Employee ID
Body:
- leave_type: string (annual, sick, personal)
- start_date: string (YYYY-MM-DD)
- end_date: string (YYYY-MM-DD)
- reason: string
Response: Returns request ID and status

GET /employees/{id}/payroll
Get payroll information for an employee.
Parameters:
- id (path, required): string - Employee ID
Response: Returns salary, deductions, and payment status

POST /hr/tickets
Create a new HR support ticket.
Body:
- employee_id: string
- category: string (benefits, payroll, leave, other)
- subject: string
- description: string
- priority: string (low, medium, high)
Response: Returns ticket ID and status
```

projects.name: gg
projects.apiDocumentation:
IoT Device Management API

Device Registration

POST /devices
Register a new IoT device.
Body:
- device_id: string - Unique device identifier
- device_type: string - Type of device (sensor, actuator, gateway)
- location: string - Physical location
- metadata: object - Additional device information
Response: Returns device registration confirmation

GET /devices/{device_id}
Get device information.
Parameters:
- device_id (path, required): string - Device ID
Response: Returns device details and status

Device Control

POST /devices/{device_id}/command
Send command to device.
Parameters:
- device_id (path, required): string - Device ID
Body:
- command: string - Command to execute
- parameters: object - Command parameters
Response: Returns command execution status

GET /devices/{device_id}/status
Get current device status.
Parameters:
- device_id (path, required): string - Device ID
Response: Returns device status (online, offline, error)

Data Collection

GET /devices/{device_id}/data
Get sensor data from device.
Parameters:
- device_id (path, required): string - Device ID
- start_time (query, optional): string - Start timestamp
- end_time (query, optional): string - End timestamp
- metric (query, optional): string - Specific metric to retrieve
Response: Returns array of sensor readings

POST /devices/{device_id}/data
Upload sensor data.
Parameters:
- device_id (path, required): string - Device ID
Body:
- timestamp: string - Reading timestamp
- metrics: object - Sensor readings
Response: Returns data upload confirmation

projects.name: Atlas
projects.apiDocumentation:
API Documentation - AtlasOps Platform
Version: 2.4.0
Base URL: https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1
Authentication: Bearer JWT in Authorization header
Content-Type: application/json

Overview
AtlasOps is a large-scale operations platform for managing users, organizations, projects, billing, notifications, audit logs, analytics, and webhooks.

Standard Headers
Authorization: Bearer <token>
X-Request-Id: <uuid>
X-Idempotency-Key: <unique-key>   # recommended for POST/PUT requests
Accept: application/json

Common Response Format
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {},
  "meta": {
    "request_id": "req_123",
    "timestamp": "2026-05-03T10:15:30Z"
  }
}

Common Error Format
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_request",
    "message": "Email is required",
    "details": []
  }
}

Pagination
Query parameters:
page: integer, default 1
limit: integer, default 25, max 100
sort: string, example "created_at:desc"

Paginated response format:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 25,
    "total": 320,
    "pages": 13
  }
}

Rate Limits
60 requests per minute per user
600 requests per minute per organization
429 returned when exceeded

Authentication Endpoints

POST /auth/register
Creates a new user account.

Request body:
{
  "name": "Maya Chen",
  "email": "maya@example.com",
  "password": "StrongPass123!",
  "company_name": "Northwind Labs"
}

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "user_id": "usr_01HZX9",
    "email": "maya@example.com",
    "name": "Maya Chen",
    "company_id": "org_01HZX1"
  }
}

POST /auth/login
Authenticates a user and returns access tokens.

Request body:
{
  "email": "maya@example.com",
  "password": "StrongPass123!"
}

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...",
    "refresh_token": "rft_01HZX9...",
    "expires_in": 3600
  }
}

POST /auth/refresh
Refreshes an access token.

Request body:
{
  "refresh_token": "rft_01HZX9..."
}

POST /auth/logout
Revokes the current session.

GET /auth/me
Returns the current authenticated user.

Users Endpoints

GET /users
Lists users in the current organization.

Query parameters:
page, limit, search, role, status

GET /users/{user_id}
Returns a single user.

POST /users
Creates a new user.

Request body:
{
  "name": "Ari Patel",
  "email": "ari@example.com",
  "role": "manager",
  "department": "operations"
}

PUT /users/{user_id}
Updates a user.

PATCH /users/{user_id}/status
Updates user status.

Request body:
{
  "status": "active"
}

DELETE /users/{user_id}
Deletes a user.

POST /users/{user_id}/invite
Sends an invitation email.

POST /users/{user_id}/reset-password
Sends a password reset link.

Organizations Endpoints

GET /organizations
Lists organizations visible to the current user.

GET /organizations/{org_id}
Returns organization details.

POST /organizations
Creates a new organization.

Request body:
{
  "name": "Northwind Labs",
  "industry": "software",
  "plan": "enterprise"
}

PUT /organizations/{org_id}
Updates organization details.

DELETE /organizations/{org_id}
Deletes an organization.

GET /organizations/{org_id}/members
Lists organization members.

POST /organizations/{org_id}/members
Adds a member to the organization.

Request body:
{
  "user_id": "usr_01HZX9",
  "role": "admin"
}

DELETE /organizations/{org_id}/members/{user_id}
Removes a member from the organization.

Projects Endpoints

GET /projects
Lists projects.

Query parameters:
page, limit, search, status, owner_id

GET /projects/{project_id}
Returns project details.

POST /projects
Creates a project.

Request body:
{
  "name": "Customer Portal Revamp",
  "description": "Modernize the customer portal UX",
  "owner_id": "usr_01HZX9",
  "priority": "high"
}

PUT /projects/{project_id}
Updates a project.

PATCH /projects/{project_id}/status
Updates project status.

Request body:
{
  "status": "in_progress"
}

DELETE /projects/{project_id}
Deletes a project.

GET /projects/{project_id}/members
Lists project members.

POST /projects/{project_id}/members
Adds a project member.

Request body:
{
  "user_id": "usr_02ABCD",
  "role": "editor"
}

DELETE /projects/{project_id}/members/{user_id}
Removes a project member.

Tasks Endpoints

GET /projects/{project_id}/tasks
Lists tasks for a project.

Query parameters:
page, limit, status, assignee_id, priority

GET /tasks/{task_id}
Returns task details.

POST /projects/{project_id}/tasks
Creates a task.

Request body:
{
  "title": "Design login flow",
  "description": "Create wireframes and review states",
  "assignee_id": "usr_01HZX9",
  "priority": "medium",
  "due_date": "2026-05-12"
}

PUT /tasks/{task_id}
Updates a task.

PATCH /tasks/{task_id}/status
Updates task status.

Request body:
{
  "status": "done"
}

PATCH /tasks/{task_id}/assignee
Reassigns a task.

Request body:
{
  "assignee_id": "usr_02ABCD"
}

DELETE /tasks/{task_id}
Deletes a task.

POST /tasks/{task_id}/comments
Adds a comment to a task.

Request body:
{
  "body": "This is ready for review."
}

GET /tasks/{task_id}/comments
Lists task comments.

Files Endpoints

GET /projects/{project_id}/files
Lists uploaded files for a project.

GET /files/{file_id}
Returns file metadata.

POST /projects/{project_id}/files
Uploads a new file.

Request: multipart/form-data
Fields:
file, filename, category

DELETE /files/{file_id}
Deletes a file.

POST /files/{file_id}/rename
Renames a file.

Request body:
{
  "filename": "spec-v2.pdf"
}

Billing Endpoints

GET /billing/subscription
Returns the current subscription.

GET /billing/invoices
Lists invoices.

GET /billing/invoices/{invoice_id}
Returns invoice details.

POST /billing/subscription/upgrade
Upgrades the plan.

Request body:
{
  "plan": "enterprise",
  "billing_cycle": "annual"
}

POST /billing/subscription/downgrade
Downgrades the plan.

POST /billing/payment-methods
Adds a payment method.

Request body:
{
  "type": "card",
  "token": "tok_visa_123"
}

GET /billing/payment-methods
Lists payment methods.

DELETE /billing/payment-methods/{method_id}
Removes a payment method.

Notifications Endpoints

GET /notifications
Lists notifications.

Query parameters:
page, limit, unread_only

PATCH /notifications/{notification_id}/read
Marks a notification as read.

PATCH /notifications/read-all
Marks all notifications as read.

POST /notifications/test
Sends a test notification to the current user.

Audit Logs Endpoints

GET /audit-logs
Lists audit log entries.

Query parameters:
page, limit, actor_id, action, resource_type, date_from, date_to

GET /audit-logs/{log_id}
Returns a single audit entry.

Analytics Endpoints

GET /analytics/overview
Returns high-level platform metrics.

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "active_users": 1842,
    "projects_created_30d": 126,
    "tasks_completed_30d": 948,
    "revenue_mrr": 48200
  }
}

GET /analytics/users
Returns user growth analytics.

GET /analytics/projects
Returns project analytics.

GET /analytics/billing
Returns billing analytics.

Search Endpoints

GET /search
Searches across users, projects, tasks, files, and notifications.

Query parameters:
q, type, page, limit

Webhooks Endpoints

GET /webhooks
Lists webhook subscriptions.

POST /webhooks
Creates a webhook subscription.

Request body:
{
  "name": "task-updates",
  "url": "https://example.com/webhooks/task-updates",
  "events": ["task.created", "task.updated", "task.deleted"],
  "secret": "whsec_123"
}

GET /webhooks/{webhook_id}
Returns webhook details.

PUT /webhooks/{webhook_id}
Updates a webhook subscription.

DELETE /webhooks/{webhook_id}
Deletes a webhook subscription.

POST /webhooks/{webhook_id}/test
Sends a test event.

Webhook Events
task.created
task.updated
task.deleted
project.created
project.updated
user.invited
invoice.paid
invoice.failed

Integrations Endpoints

GET /integrations
Lists connected integrations.

POST /integrations
Connects a new integration.

Request body:
{
  "provider": "slack",
  "settings": {
    "workspace": "northwind"
  }
}

DELETE /integrations/{integration_id}
Disconnects an integration.

POST /integrations/{integration_id}/sync
Triggers a manual sync.

Reports Endpoints

GET /reports
Lists saved reports.

POST /reports
Creates a report.

Request body:
{
  "name": "Monthly Operations Report",
  "type": "pdf",
  "filters": {
    "project_id": "prj_01HZX9"
  }
}

GET /reports/{report_id}
Returns report details.

POST /reports/{report_id}/run
Runs a report.

DELETE /reports/{report_id}
Deletes a report.

Rate-Limited Admin Endpoints

GET /admin/health
Returns service health.

GET /admin/metrics
Returns internal metrics.

GET /admin/users
Lists all users across organizations.

POST /admin/organizations/{org_id}/suspend
Suspends an organization.

Request body:
{
  "reason": "Policy violation"
}

POST /admin/organizations/{org_id}/unsuspend
Restores a suspended organization.

Object Schemas

User
{
  "id": "usr_01HZX9",
  "name": "Maya Chen",
  "email": "maya@example.com",
  "role": "admin",
  "status": "active",
  "created_at": "2026-05-03T10:15:30Z"
}

Project
{
  "id": "prj_01HZX9",
  "name": "Customer Portal Revamp",
  "description": "Modernize the customer portal UX",
  "status": "in_progress",
  "priority": "high",
  "owner_id": "usr_01HZX9"
}

Task
{
  "id": "tsk_01HZX9",
  "title": "Design login flow",
  "description": "Create wireframes and review states",
  "status": "todo",
  "priority": "medium",
  "assignee_id": "usr_02ABCD"
}

Standard HTTP Status Codes
200 OK
201 Created
204 No Content
400 Bad Request
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden
404 Not Found
409 Conflict
422 Validation Error
429 Too Many Requests
500 Internal Server Error

Example End-to-End Flow

1. Register or log in.
2. Create an organization.
3. Add members.
4. Create a project.
5. Add tasks and files.
6. Review analytics and audit logs.
7. Export reports.
8. Connect webhooks and integrations.

Example cURL

curl -X GET https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1/projects \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
  -H "Accept: application/json"

curl -X POST https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1/projects \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Customer Portal Revamp",
    "description": "Modernize the customer portal UX",
    "owner_id": "usr_01HZX9",
    "priority": "high"
  }'

curl -X POST https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1/projects/prj_01HZX9/tasks \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "title": "Design login flow",
    "description": "Create wireframes and review states",
    "assignee_id": "usr_02ABCD",
    "priority": "medium",
    "due_date": "2026-05-12"
  }'

projects.apiDocumentation:
API Documentation - AtlasOps Platform
Version: 2.4.0
Base URL: https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1

Rate Limits

429 returned when exceeded

Authentication Endpoints

POST /auth/register

Request body:

Response:

  "success": true,

    "company_id": "org_01HZX1"

}

POST /auth/login
Authenticates a user and returns access tokens.

Request body:
{
  "email": "maya@example.com",
  "password": "StrongPass123!"

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...",
    "refresh_token": "rft_01HZX9...",
    "expires_in": 3600
  }
}

POST /auth/refresh
Refreshes an access token.

Request body:
{
  "refresh_token": "rft_01HZX9..."
}

POST /auth/logout
Revokes the current session.

GET /auth/me
Returns the current authenticated user.

Users Endpoints

GET /users
Lists users in the current organization.

Query parameters:
page, limit, search, role, status

GET /users/{user_id}
Returns a single user.

POST /users
Creates a new user.

Request body:
{
  "name": "Ari Patel",
  "email": "ari@example.com",
  "role": "manager",
  "department": "operations"
}

PUT /users/{user_id}
Updates a user.

PATCH /users/{user_id}/status
Updates user status.

Request body:
{
  "status": "active"
}

DELETE /users/{user_id}
Deletes a user.

POST /users/{user_id}/invite
Sends an invitation email.

POST /users/{user_id}/reset-password
Sends a password reset link.

Organizations Endpoints

GET /organizations
Lists organizations visible to the current user.

GET /organizations/{org_id}
Returns organization details.

POST /organizations
Creates a new organization.

Request body:
{
  "name": "Northwind Labs",
  "industry": "software",
  "plan": "enterprise"
}

PUT /organizations/{org_id}
Updates organization details.

DELETE /organizations/{org_id}
Deletes an organization.

GET /organizations/{org_id}/members
Lists organization members.

POST /organizations/{org_id}/members
Adds a member to the organization.

Request body:
{
  "user_id": "usr_01HZX9",
  "role": "admin"
}

DELETE /organizations/{org_id}/members/{user_id}
Removes a member from the organization.

Projects Endpoints

GET /projects
Lists projects.

Query parameters:
page, limit, search, status, owner_id

GET /projects/{project_id}
Returns project details.

POST /projects
Creates a project.

Request body:
{
  "name": "Customer Portal Revamp",
  "description": "Modernize the customer portal UX",
  "owner_id": "usr_01HZX9",
  "priority": "high"
}

PUT /projects/{project_id}
Updates a project.

PATCH /projects/{project_id}/status
Updates project status.

Request body:
{
  "status": "in_progress"
}

DELETE /projects/{project_id}
Deletes a project.

GET /projects/{project_id}/members
Lists project members.

POST /projects/{project_id}/members
Adds a project member.

Request body:
{
  "user_id": "usr_02ABCD",
  "role": "editor"
}

DELETE /projects/{project_id}/members/{user_id}
Removes a project member.

Tasks Endpoints

GET /projects/{project_id}/tasks
Lists tasks for a project.

Query parameters:
page, limit, status, assignee_id, priority

GET /tasks/{task_id}
Returns task details.

POST /projects/{project_id}/tasks
Creates a task.

Request body:
{
  "title": "Design login flow",
  "description": "Create wireframes and review states",
  "assignee_id": "usr_01HZX9",
  "priority": "medium",
  "due_date": "2026-05-12"
}

PUT /tasks/{task_id}
Updates a task.

PATCH /tasks/{task_id}/status
Updates task status.

Request body:
{
  "status": "done"
}

PATCH /tasks/{task_id}/assignee
Reassigns a task.

Request body:
{
  "assignee_id": "usr_02ABCD"
}

DELETE /tasks/{task_id}
Deletes a task.

POST /tasks/{task_id}/comments
Adds a comment to a task.

Request body:
{
  "body": "This is ready for review."
}

GET /tasks/{task_id}/comments
Lists task comments.

Files Endpoints

GET /projects/{project_id}/files
Lists uploaded files for a project.

GET /files/{file_id}
Returns file metadata.

POST /projects/{project_id}/files
Uploads a new file.

Request: multipart/form-data
Fields:
file, filename, category

DELETE /files/{file_id}
Deletes a file.

POST /files/{file_id}/rename
Renames a file.

Request body:
{
  "filename": "spec-v2.pdf"
}

Billing Endpoints

GET /billing/subscription
Returns the current subscription.

GET /billing/invoices
Lists invoices.

GET /billing/invoices/{invoice_id}
Returns invoice details.

POST /billing/subscription/upgrade
Upgrades the plan.

Request body:
{
  "plan": "enterprise",
  "billing_cycle": "annual"
}

POST /billing/subscription/downgrade
Downgrades the plan.

POST /billing/payment-methods
Adds a payment method.

Request body:
{
  "type": "card",
  "token": "tok_visa_123"
}

GET /billing/payment-methods
Lists payment methods.

DELETE /billing/payment-methods/{method_id}
Removes a payment method.

Notifications Endpoints

GET /notifications
Lists notifications.

Query parameters:
page, limit, unread_only

PATCH /notifications/{notification_id}/read
Marks a notification as read.

PATCH /notifications/read-all
Marks all notifications as read.

POST /notifications/test
Sends a test notification to the current user.

Audit Logs Endpoints

GET /audit-logs
Lists audit log entries.

Query parameters:
page, limit, actor_id, action, resource_type, date_from, date_to

GET /audit-logs/{log_id}
Returns a single audit entry.

Analytics Endpoints

GET /analytics/overview
Returns high-level platform metrics.

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "active_users": 1842,
    "projects_created_30d": 126,
    "tasks_completed_30d": 948,
    "revenue_mrr": 48200
  }
}

GET /analytics/users
Returns user growth analytics.

GET /analytics/projects
Returns project analytics.

GET /analytics/billing
Returns billing analytics.

Search Endpoints

GET /search
Searches across users, projects, tasks, files, and notifications.

Query parameters:
q, type, page, limit

Webhooks Endpoints

GET /webhooks
Lists webhook subscriptions.

POST /webhooks
Creates a webhook subscription.

Request body:
{
  "name": "task-updates",
  "url": "https://example.com/webhooks/task-updates",
  "events": ["task.created", "task.updated", "task.deleted"],
  "secret": "whsec_123"
}

GET /webhooks/{webhook_id}
Returns webhook details.

PUT /webhooks/{webhook_id}
Updates a webhook subscription.

DELETE /webhooks/{webhook_id}
Deletes a webhook subscription.

POST /webhooks/{webhook_id}/test
Sends a test event.

Webhook Events
task.created
task.updated
task.deleted
project.created
project.updated
user.invited
invoice.paid
invoice.failed

Integrations Endpoints

GET /integrations
Lists connected integrations.

POST /integrations
Connects a new integration.

Request body:
{
  "provider": "slack",
  "settings": {
    "workspace": "northwind"
  }
}

DELETE /integrations/{integration_id}
Disconnects an integration.

POST /integrations/{integration_id}/sync
Triggers a manual sync.

Reports Endpoints

GET /reports
Lists saved reports.

POST /reports
Creates a report.

Request body:
{
  "name": "Monthly Operations Report",
  "type": "pdf",
  "filters": {
    "project_id": "prj_01HZX9"
  }
}

GET /reports/{report_id}
Returns report details.

POST /reports/{report_id}/run
Runs a report.

DELETE /reports/{report_id}
Deletes a report.

Rate-Limited Admin Endpoints

GET /admin/health
Returns service health.

GET /admin/metrics
Returns internal metrics.

GET /admin/users
Lists all users across organizations.

POST /admin/organizations/{org_id}/suspend
Suspends an organization.

Request body:
{
  "reason": "Policy violation"
}

POST /admin/organizations/{org_id}/unsuspend
Restores a suspended organization.

Object Schemas

User
{
  "id": "usr_01HZX9",
  "name": "Maya Chen",
  "email": "maya@example.com",
  "role": "admin",
  "status": "active",
  "created_at": "2026-05-03T10:15:30Z"
}

Project
{
  "id": "prj_01HZX9",
  "name": "Customer Portal Revamp",
  "description": "Modernize the customer portal UX",
  "status": "in_progress",
  "priority": "high",
  "owner_id": "usr_01HZX9"
}

Task
{
  "id": "tsk_01HZX9",
  "title": "Design login flow",
  "description": "Create wireframes and review states",
  "status": "todo",
  "priority": "medium",
  "assignee_id": "usr_02ABCD"
}

Standard HTTP Status Codes
200 OK
201 Created
204 No Content
400 Bad Request
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden
404 Not Found
409 Conflict
422 Validation Error
429 Too Many Requests
500 Internal Server Error

Example End-to-End Flow

1. Register or log in.
2. Create an organization.
3. Add members.
4. Create a project.
5. Add tasks and files.
6. Review analytics and audit logs.
7. Export reports.
8. Connect webhooks and integrations.

Example cURL

curl -X GET https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1/projects \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
  -H "Accept: application/json"

curl -X POST https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1/projects \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Customer Portal Revamp",
    "description": "Modernize the customer portal UX",
    "owner_id": "usr_01HZX9",
    "priority": "high"
  }'

curl -X POST https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1/projects/prj_01HZX9/tasks \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "title": "Design login flow",
    "description": "Create wireframes and review states",
    "assignee_id": "usr_02ABCD",
    "priority": "medium",
    "due_date": "2026-05-12"
  }'
